notes: Resolve $ENV placeholders before submitting. Encode each arguments[i] entry into calldatas[i]. Proposal IDs are computed by the governor onchain.

proposals.title: Set Q2 marketing budget ceiling
proposals.description: Summary: Set a hard treasury ceiling for Q2 marketing spend so growth campaigns stay budgeted and reviewable. Rationale: The DAO needs a fixed cap for content, paid acquisition, and co-marketing activity instead of approving open-ended spending. Implementation: Set MARKETING_BUDGET_Q2 to 25,000 tokens on the Treasury module.

proposals.title: Increase bug bounty reserve
proposals.description: Summary: Expand the dedicated bug bounty reserve to improve security response readiness. Rationale: Security payouts should not compete with operating budgets after a critical disclosure. Implementation: Set BUG_BOUNTY_POOL to 10,000 tokens on the Treasury module.

proposals.title: Create ecosystem grants round 1 pool
proposals.description: Summary: Open a dedicated grant pool for early ecosystem builders on Monad testnet. Rationale: Small grants help bootstrap integrations, dashboards, bots, and documentation without mixing those expenses into core treasury operations. Implementation: Set ECOSYSTEM_GRANTS_R1 to 50,000 tokens on the Treasury module.

proposals.title: Set treasury runway floor policy
proposals.description: Summary: Define a minimum treasury runway target so spending policy remains conservative during volatile periods. Rationale: The DAO should avoid approving new discretionary spending if runway drops below the agreed floor. Implementation: Set TREASURY_RUNWAY_FLOOR_MONTHS to 18 on the Treasury module.

proposals.title: Set stable reserve target in basis points
proposals.description: Summary: Reserve a portion of treasury assets in stable form to protect operating continuity. Rationale: The DAO should preserve enough low-volatility capital to cover payroll, grants, and critical services. Implementation: Set STABLE_RESERVE_BPS to 3500 on the Treasury module.

proposals.title: Tighten WETH LTV parameter
proposals.description: Summary: Reduce the maximum allowed leverage on WETH-backed positions. Rationale: A slightly tighter LTV reduces liquidation cascades while keeping the market functional for borrowers. Implementation: Set WETH_LTV_BPS to 7600 on the Risk module.

proposals.title: Raise USDC borrow cap
proposals.description: Summary: Expand the USDC borrow cap to support higher usage after recent liquidity growth. Rationale: Borrow demand has increased, but the protocol still wants a hard ceiling to limit tail risk. Implementation: Set USDC_BORROW_CAP to 15,000,000 tokens on the Risk module.

proposals.title: Update WBTC liquidation threshold
proposals.description: Summary: Adjust the WBTC liquidation threshold to better reflect recent volatility. Rationale: A tighter threshold improves solvency protection without fully disabling the asset's utility. Implementation: Set WBTC_LT_BPS to 8000 on the Risk module.

proposals.title: Set ETH/USD oracle heartbeat
proposals.description: Summary: Define a stricter heartbeat for the core ETH/USD oracle feed. Rationale: Faster stale-price detection reduces the chance of bad debt from delayed oracle updates. Implementation: Set ETH_USD_HEARTBEAT_SEC to 3600 on the Risk module.

proposals.title: Enable isolation mode guardrail
proposals.description: Summary: Turn on isolation mode as a protocol-wide safety feature for riskier markets. Rationale: Isolation limits contagion from newly listed or volatile assets. Implementation: Set ISOLATION_MODE_ENABLED to true on the Risk module.

proposals.title: Increase governance quorum
proposals.description: Summary: Raise the minimum quorum requirement for passing governance proposals. Rationale: Higher quorum can improve legitimacy and reduce the risk of low-participation changes. Implementation: Set QUORUM_BPS to 1200 on the Governance module.

proposals.title: Extend voting period length
proposals.description: Summary: Give tokenholders a longer window to react to new proposals. Rationale: Slightly longer voting periods can increase participation for global communities without making governance too slow. Implementation: Set VOTING_PERIOD_BLOCKS to 7200 on the Governance module.

proposals.title: Tune governance voting delay
proposals.description: Summary: Shorten the time between proposal submission and voting start while keeping enough review time. Rationale: This helps governance move faster for routine changes without collapsing deliberation entirely. Implementation: Set VOTING_DELAY_BLOCKS to 600 on the Governance module.

proposals.title: Lower proposal threshold
proposals.description: Summary: Reduce the token threshold required to open a proposal. Rationale: Lowering the threshold can make governance more accessible to aligned delegates while still requiring meaningful stake. Implementation: Set PROPOSAL_THRESHOLD to 100,000 tokens on the Governance module.

proposals.title: Create delegate rewards pilot pool
proposals.description: Summary: Establish a pilot budget for delegate participation rewards. Rationale: A small reward pool can improve attendance, proposal review quality, and long-term governance sustainability. Implementation: Set DELEGATE_REWARD_POOL to 12,000 tokens on the Governance module.

proposals.title: Enable delegate rewards pilot
proposals.description: Summary: Turn on the delegate rewards program after setting its funding cap. Rationale: Explicit activation makes it easy to separate budget approval from policy activation. Implementation: Set DELEGATE_REWARDS_ENABLED to true on the Governance module.

proposals.title: Publish governance forum URI
proposals.description: Summary: Anchor the official forum URI in governance-managed config. Rationale: A canonical URI helps voters and tooling find the correct offchain discussion source. Implementation: Set GOVERNANCE_FORUM_URI to ipfs://aido-forum-v1 on the Governance module.

proposals.title: Set governance metadata schema
proposals.description: Summary: Standardize proposal metadata formatting for external tooling and dashboards. Rationale: A shared metadata schema makes proposal rendering and analytics more reliable across clients. Implementation: Set GOVERNANCE_METADATA_SCHEMA to ipfs://aido-dao-schema-v1 on the Governance module.

proposals.title: Approve H2 monitoring budget
proposals.description: Summary: Reserve operating budget for uptime monitoring and alerting through the second half of the year. Rationale: Monitoring is a core protocol cost and should be explicitly budgeted. Implementation: Set MONITORING_BUDGET_H2 to 8,000 tokens on the Operations module.

proposals.title: Enable RPC failover mode
proposals.description: Summary: Activate failover support for RPC dependencies. Rationale: A live failover path reduces downtime risk during provider incidents or traffic spikes. Implementation: Set RPC_FAILOVER_ENABLED to true on the Operations module.

proposals.title: Require emergency pause drills
proposals.description: Summary: Make periodic incident-response drills a formal DAO policy. Rationale: Governance should verify that operators can execute emergency procedures before a real incident occurs. Implementation: Set PAUSE_DRILL_REQUIRED to true on the Operations module.

proposals.title: Set incident response playbook URI
proposals.description: Summary: Anchor the latest incident response playbook in onchain config. Rationale: A canonical playbook URI makes it easier for operators and delegates to verify the current runbook. Implementation: Set INCIDENT_RESPONSE_PLAYBOOK to ipfs://aido-incident-playbook-v1 on the Operations module.

proposals.title: Reduce daily staking emissions
proposals.description: Summary: Lower staking emissions to improve token issuance efficiency. Rationale: Emissions should support participation without permanently oversubsidizing passive holders. Implementation: Set STAKING_EMISSION_PER_DAY to 450 tokens on the Emissions module.

proposals.title: Set monthly liquidity mining cap
proposals.description: Summary: Put a hard monthly cap on liquidity mining spend. Rationale: Incentive programs should be bounded and auditable rather than left to informal operator discretion. Implementation: Set LM_MONTHLY_CAP to 15,000 tokens on the Emissions module.

proposals.title: Increase GHO utility rebate
proposals.description: Summary: Add a modest rebate for GHO-related protocol activity. Rationale: Targeted rebates can improve utility without reopening broad emissions expansion. Implementation: Set GHO_UTILITY_REBATE_BPS to 150 on the Emissions module.

proposals.title: Create hackathon sponsorship pool
proposals.description: Summary: Allocate a budget for community hackathons and builder events. Rationale: Hackathon sponsorship is one of the fastest ways to attract experiments, integrations, and developer mindshare. Implementation: Set HACKATHON_SPONSOR_POOL to 20,000 tokens on the Growth module.

proposals.title: Enable rsETH listing flag
proposals.description: Summary: Turn on the governance listing flag for a new collateral candidate. Rationale: This proposal is a simplified onchain demo for enabling a new growth-oriented market. Implementation: Set RSETH_LISTED to true on the Growth module.

proposals.title: Set H2 ambassador budget
proposals.description: Summary: Fund the second-half ambassador and community education program. Rationale: Local advocates can improve retention, documentation, and organic awareness in emerging communities. Implementation: Set AMBASSADOR_BUDGET_H2 to 12,000 tokens on the Growth module.

proposals.title: Set strategic integration grant pool
proposals.description: Summary: Establish a pool for integrations with wallets, analytics tools, and partner protocols. Rationale: Dedicated integration funding can accelerate partner adoption while keeping the spend visible to governance. Implementation: Set INTEGRATION_GRANT_POOL to 30,000 tokens on the Partnerships module.

proposals.title: Enable public governance dashboards
proposals.description: Summary: Turn on the public dashboard flag for broader transparency. Rationale: Public analytics dashboards can improve accountability and make it easier for tokenholders to follow governance activity. Implementation: Set PUBLIC_DASHBOARDS_ENABLED to true on the Operations module.
